description_long: This is a pair of tactical or work gloves featuring a two-tone color scheme with tan palms and black backs. The gloves have reinforced padding on the palm and finger areas, providing extra protection and grip for the wearer. The fingers are individually articulated, and the gloves appear to be made from a combination of synthetic leather and fabric, offering both durability and flexibility. The cuffs are slightly extended and appear to be slip-on, with no visible closure mechanism. The surface of the gloves is mostly matte with some grippy texture on the palm and finger areas. These gloves are suitable for urban activities such as cycling, construction, or general outdoor work.
description: A pair of tan and black padded gloves with reinforced palms and articulated fingers, designed for durability and grip. The gloves have a slip-on design and are made from synthetic leather and fabric.
description_view_0: The gloves are seen from the palm side, highlighting the tan padded areas and reinforced sections for grip and protection.
description_view_1: This view shows the gloves from an angle, displaying both the palm and the back, with the black fabric covering the back of the hand and fingers.
description_view_2: The gloves are viewed from the back, emphasizing the black fabric and the tan accents on the fingers and wrist area.
description_view_3: The gloves are seen from the open cuff side, showing the interior opening and the slip-on design with no visible closure.
